title: task
description: schc.c:485-489 - When bitmap_bits == 63, the condition 'if (bitmap_bits < 63)' causes the masking to be skipped. This leaves bit 63 potentially containing garbage from the input data. While current code never accesses bit 63 (FCN values iterate 0-62), this is technically incorrect and could cause issues if bitmaps are compared directly. Fix: change condition to 'if (bitmap_bits > 0)' or remove condition entirely since bitmap_bits <= 63 is already validated.
close_reason: Fixed: Changed condition from 'bitmap_bits < 63' to 'bitmap_bits < 64' to include masking for 63-bit bitmaps
